name: Deep Book Imbalance Pressure
hypothesis: While top-of-book imbalance (obi_1) is predictive, pressure from deeper in the book (levels 2-10) contains supplementary information. A strong imbalance across the top 10 levels should also predict next-tick price moves, potentially capturing different market dynamics than obi_1 alone.
mutation_note: New spec from a different feature family (deep book imbalance). After extensive refinement of obi_1 and inconclusive results from OFI, this spec explores whether cumulative imbalance over more levels (obi_10) provides a viable alternative predictive signal.
